mapper.select: SELECT tbtrOrd.ORD_NO, tbtrOrd.USR_ID, tbtrOrd.SCHD_NO, tbtrOrd.TOT_AMT, tbtrOrd.ITEM_CNT, COUNT(cnclOrd.ORD_NO) AS CNCL_CNT FROM TBTR_ORD tbtrOrd LEFT JOIN TBTR_ORD cnclOrd ON cnclOrd.OORD_NO = tbtrOrd.ORD_NO AND cnclOrd.ORD_ST_CD = '2' WHERE tbtrOrd.ORD_NO = #{ordNo} AND tbtrOrd.ORD_ST_CD = '0' GROUP BY tbtrOrd.ORD_NO, tbtrOrd.USR_ID, tbtrOrd.SCHD_NO, tbtrOrd.TOT_AMT, tbtrOrd.ITEM_CNT
SELECT tbtrOrdItem.PRD_NO, tbtrOrdItem.ORD_QTY, tbtrOrdItem.PRD_PRC FROM TBTR_ORD_ITEM tbtrOrdItem WHERE tbtrOrdItem.ORD_NO = #{ordNo} ORDER BY tbtrOrdItem.PRD_NO

SELECT tbtrOrd.ORD_NO, tbtrOrd.SCHD_NO, tbevEvnt.EVNT_NM, tbtrOrd.ITEM_CNT, tbtrOrd.TOT_AMT, tbtrOrd.TRX_DT, CASE WHEN COUNT(cnclOrd.ORD_NO) > 0 THEN '2' ELSE '0' END AS ORD_ST_CD, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CONCAT(tbpdPrd.PRD_NM, ' x', tbtrOrdItem.ORD_QTY) ORDER BY tbpdPrd.PRD_NO SEPARATOR ', ') AS ITEM_DESC FROM TBTR_ORD tbtrOrd JOIN TBEV_SCHD tbevSchd ON tbevSchd.SCHD_NO = tbtrOrd.SCHD_NO JOIN TBEV_EVNT tbevEvnt ON tbevEvnt.EVNT_NO = tbevSchd.EVNT_NO JOIN TBTR_ORD_ITEM tbtrOrdItem ON tbtrOrdItem.ORD_NO = tbtrOrd.ORD_NO JOIN TBPD_PRD tbpdPrd ON tbpdPrd.PRD_NO = tbtrOrdItem.PRD_NO LEFT JOIN TBTR_ORD cnclOrd ON cnclOrd.OORD_NO = tbtrOrd.ORD_NO AND cnclOrd.ORD_ST_CD = '2' WHERE tbtrOrd.USR_ID = #{usrId} AND tbtrOrd.ORD_ST_CD = '0' GROUP BY tbtrOrd.ORD_NO, tbtrOrd.SCHD_NO, tbevEvnt.EVNT_NM, tbtrOrd.ITEM_CNT, tbtrOrd.TOT_AMT, tbtrOrd.TRX_DT ORDER BY tbtrOrd.TRX_DT DESC
